description: Canonical versioned response wire shape for policy-sync's cluster-internal POST /osv/querybatch endpoint. This is a field-name/shape contract (not a compute lockstep like min-age-vectors.json) shared by the Python producer (policy-sync osv.response_payload) and the two consumers: the npm filter (verdaccio-filter-artea osv.ts) and the PyPI devpi plugin (artea_devpi_policy query_osv_blocked_versions). Policy-sync also supports compact package_summary responses that use the same result entry shape but return only blocking hits, or status=needs_versions to trigger a versioned retry. 'status' drives cacheability: only 'ok' is cache-complete; non-ok statuses can still carry blocking verdicts but must not be cached because they may include fail-open allowed entries. 'reason' is observability-only. Each producer/consumer sends its own 'ecosystem' string ('npm' or 'pypi'); the value is deliberately not part of this shape contract.
